Put the upstream Dear ImGui backend files in this folder:

- imgui_impl_win32.h
- imgui_impl_win32.cpp
- imgui_impl_dx11.h
- imgui_impl_dx11.cpp

You can copy them from the official ImGui repository under backends/.
If you already installed imgui via vcpkg, you can usually find them under:
  %VCPKG_ROOT%\buildtrees\imgui\src\*\backends\

After copying, rerun CMake configure + build.
